title: Advancing special education research through think-in, seminar
summary_en: Researchers and faculty members in special education came together for two days of work in April through a think-in and seminar at the IU School of Education, with the goal of establishing a shared, forward-looking vision for the future of research and impact in the field of intellectual disability.
title_cn: 依托专题研讨与研讨会推进特殊教育研究工作
